questions.question: Define class declaration.
questions.answer: A class declaration is the part of a Java program where the class is introduced and named.

questions.question: Define main method.
questions.answer: The main method is the method from which the execution of a Java program begins.

questions.question: Define data type.
questions.answer: A data type tells Java what kind of value a variable can store.

questions.question: Define variable.
questions.answer: A variable is a named storage location used to store a value.

questions.question: Define declaration.
questions.answer: Declaration means writing the data type and the variable name.

questions.question: Define initialization.
questions.answer: Initialization is the process of assigning a value to a variable.

questions.question: Define literal.
questions.answer: A literal is the actual value written directly in the program.

questions.question: Define arithmetic operator.
questions.answer: An arithmetic operator is a symbol used to perform a mathematical operation.

questions.question: Define modulus operator.
questions.answer: The modulus operator is the operator that gives the remainder after division.

questions.question: Define operand.
questions.answer: An operand is the value or variable on which an operator works.

questions.question: Define expression.
questions.answer: An expression is a piece of code that produces a value when evaluated.

questions.question: Define statement.
questions.answer: A statement is a complete command in Java that tells the program to perform an action.

questions.question: Define binary operator.
questions.answer: A binary operator is an operator that works on two operands.

questions.question: Define assignment operator.
questions.answer: The assignment operator is the symbol used to assign a value to a variable.
